title: Release PDF standard
steps: Send request email with release PDF, sync, refresh
expected_result: Single row created; customer/lane/invoice/PO extracted

title: BOL-first format
steps: Send request email with BOL PDF, sync, refresh
expected_result: BOL + lane extracted; no duplicate row

title: Invoice-only format
steps: Send request email with invoice PDF, sync, refresh
expected_result: Invoice extracted; lane from ship from/ship to; no duplicate row

title: Multi-page mixed PDF
steps: Send request email with 3+ page PDF, sync, refresh
expected_result: Core refs extracted from full document

title: Low-quality scanned PDF
steps: Send request with scanned PDF, sync, refresh
expected_result: Row created with manual verification; no crash

title: PDF missing PO/BOL
steps: Send PDF with only lane/customer, sync, refresh
expected_result: Partial row created; no crash; no false fields

title: Thread create request
steps: Send new request email, sync
expected_result: Status Shipment Requested and pickup_date Pending

title: Thread pickup completed
steps: Reply same thread: load has been picked up now + carrier, sync
expected_result: Same row updated; status progresses to in-transit lifecycle; pickup_date date-only

title: Thread ETA update numeric
steps: Reply same thread: ETA is 03/15, sync
expected_result: Same row ETA updated to valid date

title: Thread ETA natural language
steps: Reply same thread: ETA is Friday 13th, sync
expected_result: Same row ETA parsed to valid date

title: Thread delivery complete
steps: Reply same thread: delivered today, sync
expected_result: Same row status Delivered

title: Conditional pickup phrase
steps: Send: let me know when it's picked up, sync
expected_result: No false completion; pickup_date remains/sets Pending

title: Future pickup phrase
steps: Send: to be picked up tomorrow, sync
expected_result: No false completion; pickup_date set from phrase if present else Pending

title: Question phrase
steps: Send: has it been picked up?, sync
expected_result: No false completion; status unchanged

title: Carrier freeform phrase
steps: Send: carrier is JB Hunt, sync
expected_result: US carrier updated on existing row

title: Generic customer label trap
steps: Send: customer: picking address, sync
expected_result: Generic label blocked from customer extraction

title: DOC ref update by PO
steps: Send update with PO only, sync
expected_result: Matches existing row by PO and updates same row

title: DOC ref update by invoice
steps: Send update with invoice only, sync
expected_result: Matches existing row by invoice and updates same row

title: Ambiguous doc refs handling
steps: Send update where PO appears in legacy duplicates, sync
expected_result: No new duplicate created; one dashboard identity

title: 20-email burst in 1 hour
steps: Send 20 mixed request/reply emails, sync every 10 minutes
expected_result: No row explosion; no missed updates; acceptable sync time
